summary: Architecture review complete. ARCHITECTURE.md (654 lines, 12 module sections) fully documents all 41 source files (3,767 LOC). All gap monitors at ≥90% (vision=91%, prd=90%, dbb=90%). Remaining partial gaps are documented known limitations (middleware minimal, MediaPipe browser-only, mDNS not implemented). Codebase-map updated with accurate test status. No ARCHITECTURE.md changes needed — all store, embed, adapter, profiler, CLI modules already have formal documentation sections.
